RequestBody.description: A test agent created from the .NET SDK automation suite

definition.workflow:
kind: workflow
trigger:
  kind: OnConversationStart
  id: my_workflow
  actions:
    - kind: SendActivity
      id: sendActivity_welcome
      activity: hello world
    - kind: EndConversation
      id: end_conversation
